title: The Understudy WIP
description: Work-in-progress build of The Understudy, a new playable character for Slay the Spire 2. Shared for friend testing. Requires BaseLib.
changeNote: v1.10.14 - Card pass: retired the Limited/Shaken/Jaded card slots in favor of Tension and Swap. 8 self-debuff cards now apply Tension; Stage Fright/Buy Time/Procrastinate/Start Over and 3 new cards (Limelight, Body Double, Method Acting) are Swap cards on the larger 3/6/10 scale. Removed Sad/Pop/Old Song, Center Stage, and Playlist (may return later). Deck now has 9 Tension, 8 Swap, 8 Vigor cards. Requires BaseLib.
